creator: robak@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,

I've tested the fsc on FreeBSD 10.1 with latest port version (fsc-1.0.1_3) and I cant reproduce the issue you're reporting:

root@101amd64-default:~ # /usr/local/etc/rc.d/fscd onestart
root@101amd64-default:~ # ps waux | grep fsc
root 63196  0.0  0.0 18892 2304  -  SsJ   5:26PM 0:00.00 /usr/local/sbin/fscd
root 63316  0.0  0.0 18804 2292  3  R+J   5:26PM 0:00.00 grep fsc
root@101amd64-default:~ #

Could you please verify and report back if you still see it?

Kind regards,
Bartek Rutkowski
